summary: CapyMatch Pipeline Page Redesign - Complete UI Testing. All 17 features tested and verified. The redesigned Pipeline page has: 1) Page header with 'Your Pipeline' title and summary chips (colored dots with counts), 2) Single-column dark hero carousel showing one school at a time with all required elements, 3) 'Coming Up Next' timeline section with school cards and time labels, 4) Kanban board below. No side panels or capacity strip inside hero.
critical_code_review_comments: PipelineHero.js correctly implements single-column dark gradient design with no side panels
Page header with summary chips correctly shows colored dots (red=attention, purple=momentum, green=on-track) with counts
Filter pills (All/Needs Attention/Keep Momentum Going) work correctly inside hero top bar
Hero card shows: category label, school identity (logo+name+metadata pills), match score, progress rail, 'What to do next' box, owner badge, CTA button
Carousel navigation arrows and X/Y counter work correctly when >1 item
ComingUpTimeline.js correctly renders timeline with school cards showing time labels (Today, In 1 Day, In 2 Days)
Kanban board renders correctly below the timeline section
No hero-right-col or hero-queue testids present (confirming single-column layout)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline Page redesigned. Key data-testid attributes: pipeline-header, summary-chips, chip-attention (red), chip-momentum (purple), chip-on-track (green), pipeline-hero, hero-top-bar, hero-filter-pills, hero-filter-all/attention/momentum, carousel-prev/next, carousel-counter, hero-category-label, hero-school-name, hero-match-score, hero-progress-rail, hero-advice-box, hero-advice-text, hero-owner-badge, hero-cta-btn, coming-up-timeline, timeline-card-{id}, kanban-board. Test data: 2 actionable items (1 needs attention = University of Florida, 1 keep momentum = Stanford), 5 on-track items. Timeline shows 3 cards (Today, In 1 Day, In 2 Days).

verified_requirements.category_label_in_hero: ✅ PASS - 'NEEDS ATTENTION NOW' (red) or 'KEEP MOMENTUM GOING' (purple)
verified_requirements.school_identity_in_hero: ✅ PASS - University of Florida logo, name, metadata pills (D1, SEC, Outreach, Coach task open)
verified_requirements.progress_rail_with_dots: ✅ PASS - Progress rail with stage dots (Added→Outreach→Talking→Visit→Offer→Committed)
verified_requirements.what_to_do_next_box: ✅ PASS - Advice box with context text
verified_requirements.carousel_navigation: ✅ PASS - Prev/Next arrows work, counter shows '1 / 2'
verified_requirements.filter_pills_work: ✅ PASS - All(2), Needs Attention(1), Keep Momentum Going(1) - clicking changes content
verified_requirements.coming_up_next_timeline: ✅ PASS - Timeline section renders below hero
verified_requirements.timeline_school_cards_with_time: ✅ PASS - Cards show time labels (Today, In 1 Day, In 2 Days)
verified_requirements.kanban_board_renders: ✅ PASS - Kanban board visible below timeline

frontend_playwright.timeline_time_labels: ✅ PASS - Today, In 1 Day, In 2 Days
